evals.prompt: Find private B2B SaaS companies in the United States, 50-200 employees, Series A or Series B funding in the last year, in software development. Exclude consulting and nonprofits.
evals.expected_output: Directly maps to Prospeo filters and runs search. No clarifying questions.
expectations: Calls mcp__prospeo__get_account_info first to detect plan
Reads prospeo-enums.json to check cache freshness
Maps 'US' to 'United States' via search_suggestions
Sets company_type.status = 'Private', business_model = 'b2b', subtypes.include = ['SaaS']
Sets company_funding.stage = ['Series A', 'Series B'], funding_date = 365
Sets company_industry.include = ['Software Development']
Sets company_industry.exclude to include consulting industry values
Adds a revenue default based on headcount (5M-50M)
Shows assembled filters for confirmation before searching
Calls mcp__prospeo__search_company with correct filter JSON
Presents total count, 25-row preview table, credit cost, and options

evals.expected_output: Identifies 'tech' as vague, shows matching industries/subtypes, asks clarifying questions for missing mandatory filters.
expectations: Calls mcp__prospeo__get_account_info first
Identifies 'tech' is not a single Prospeo enum value
Shows matching industries (Software Development, IT Services, Technology Information and Internet, etc.)
Shows matching subtypes (SaaS, Platform, AI/ML, etc.)
Lets user pick which industries/subtypes match
Resolves 'Germany' via search_suggestions for exact location value
Asks about missing mandatory filters: company size, status, revenue
Offers smart defaults for each missing filter
Builds filters incrementally as user answers
Only runs search after all 5 mandatory filters are covered

evals.prompt: Find private AI companies in the US, 50-500 employees, Series A-C, similar to scale.ai
evals.expected_output: Parses full ICP, drops lookalike from final search with warning, runs search with ICP filters only.
expectations: Calls GET /account-information first to detect plan
Checks plan supports lookalike (requires Starter+)
Maps all ICP filters correctly
Sets company_type.is_mainly_ai = true
Does NOT add company_lookalike to the final search filters
Warns user that lookalike is removed because it narrows results dramatically
Offers to add it back if user insists
Adds revenue default based on headcount range
Shows assembled ICP-only filters for confirmation
Runs search without lookalike filter
Presents results with count, preview, credit cost

evals.prompt: Find companies similar to torc.ai and field.ai, in the US and Germany, around 50-500 employees
evals.expected_output: Keeps location + headcount, runs lookalike for discovery only, analyzes patterns, recommends filters, drops lookalike from final search with warning.
expectations: Calls GET /account-information first to detect plan
Keeps user's known filters: location (US, Germany) and headcount (50-500)
Runs lookalike search for discovery only (1-2 credits)
For multiple domains: gets company_oids first, then uses oid mode
Analyzes the 25 lookalike results for patterns
Extracts: top industries, funding stages, revenue ranges, keywords
Presents findings and recommends additional filters
Waits for user confirmation before adding discovered filters
Merges confirmed filters with user's original inputs
Drops lookalike from the final search filters
Warns user that lookalike is removed to avoid narrowing results
Runs full search with ICP filters only

evals.prompt: Find companies similar to torc.ai and field.ai
evals.expected_output: Runs lookalike for discovery, analyzes 25 results, builds full ICP from patterns, drops lookalike from final search with warning, runs ICP-only search.
expectations: Calls GET /account-information first to detect plan
Gets Prospeo company IDs for both domains via company.websites.include search
Runs company_lookalike with company_oids mode, match_all = false (discovery only)
Analyzes all 25 results from page 1 (no export needed)
Extracts patterns for ALL 5 mandatory filters
Presents full ICP recommendation built from patterns
Waits for user to confirm or adjust
Builds complete filter JSON from confirmed patterns
Drops lookalike from the final search filters
Warns user that lookalike is removed to avoid narrowing results
Runs final search with ICP filters only
Total credit cost: 2-3 credits (seed lookup + lookalike + final search)
